market_summary: Markets consolidating ahead of Friday retail sales data with tech showing relative strength.

picks.name: Super Micro Computer Inc.
picks.thesis: Earnings beat expected after close today, high short interest creates squeeze potential.
picks.entry_note: Enter on opening strength or pullback to $835-840 range before earnings.
picks.exit_signals: Exit if earnings disappoint or target reached in after-hours session.

picks.name: Broadcom Inc.

picks.exit_signals: Exit if breaks below $1,420 or after earnings announcement next Wednesday.
